channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Forensic experts recover huge digital evidence including 100GB data from arrested suspect Anmol in Karachi drug case
item.description: According to reliable sources, the National Counter Corruption and Intelligence Agency has recovered more than 100GB of important data from the mobile phone of Anmol alias Pinky, who was arrested on s...

item.title: Katy Perry and Justin Trudeau reportedly seen together during a picnic in Santa Barbara amid ongoing romance speculation
item.description: Katy Perry and former Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau have once again become the focus of public attention after being reportedly seen together during a private picnic in Santa Barbara, Califor...

item.title: Foreign Policy Commentator Criticizes Proposed U.S.-Iran Agreement Following 106-Day Conflict
item.description: A political and foreign policy debate emerged after President Donald Trump and Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif announced what they described as an agreement between the United States and Iran ...

item.title: Tanzania Government Intensifies National Water Grid Expansion and Infrastructure Development Drive
item.description: In Singida Region, Tanzania, Prime Minister Dr Mwigulu Nchemba has instructed officials from the Ministry of Water to speed up the implementation of government plans aimed at improving access to clean...

item.title: Cape Verde hold Spain to goalless draw in World Cup debut
item.description: Cape Verde made history on Monday night after holding Spain to a 0-0 draw in their FIFA World Cup debut match, delivering one of the biggest surprises of the tournament so far. The Group H encounter s...

item.title: Little-known NCPI office in Howrah emerges as centre of TMC rebels' merger move
item.description: A modest two-storey house in Hatgachi village of Howrah district, West Bengal, has unexpectedly become the focal point of a major political development after 20 rebel Trinamool Congress (TMC) Members ...

item.title: Baseus Spacemate RD1 Pro review: a powerful but expensive 15-port docking hub
item.description: The article reviews the Baseus Spacemate RD1 Pro, a premium 15-in-1 docking hub priced at around $300, designed to expand connectivity for laptops and desktop setups. The reviewer explains that while ...

item.title: Doctor Highlights Six Early Warning Signs of Diabetes and When to Seek Medical Advice
item.description: A general practitioner has warned the public about six common but often overlooked symptoms that may signal diabetes, emphasizing the importance of early detection. Diabetes is a condition that affect...

item.title: Rachel Maddow Questions Possible Conflict of Interest in Delayed Opening of Gordie Howe International Bridge
item.description: MSNBC host Rachel Maddow devoted a segment of her program to examining the continued closure of the Gordie Howe International Bridge, a major infrastructure project connecting Detroit, Michigan, and W...

item.title: Pakistan Announces Geneva Signing Ceremony for US-Iran Peace Agreement Following Ceasefire Framework
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif informed the National Assembly that Pakistan will host the signing ceremony of a US-Iran peace agreement in Geneva on June 19. He described the development as a major dip...

item.title: Proposed US-Iran Peace Deal Highlights Failure to Achieve Initial US and Israeli War Objectives
item.description: This opinion article by Amin Saikal argues that the reported understanding reached between the United States and Iran to end the conflict that began in February 2026 represents a strategic setback for...

item.title: Analyst Raises Conflict-of-Interest Concerns Over Ads During White House UFC Event
item.description: A political commentator has raised concerns about potential conflicts of interest involving President Donald Trump during a recent UFC event held at the White House. The event, branded as “UFC Freedom...

item.title: Observers react to Donald Trump’s appearance and stamina during G7 Summit in France
item.description: During the G7 Summit held in Évian-les-Bains, France, U.S. President Donald Trump’s appearance drew public attention and commentary regarding his health and stamina. The 80-year-old president traveled...

item.title: Online backlash follows JD Vance comments on U.S.–Iran nuclear inspection negotiations in Fox News interview

item.title: A Collection of 30 Early 20th-Century Alcohol Advertising Posters Designed by Leonetto Cappiello
item.description: Vintage Everyday presents a curated collection of 30 advertising posters created by renowned Italian-born artist Leonetto Cappiello (1875–1942), one of the most influential figures in early twentieth-...

item.title: Exploring Pennsylvania’s Historic Wooden Roller Coasters
item.description: This article presents a journey through Pennsylvania’s rich heritage of wooden roller coasters, highlighting how the state played a central role in the development of early amusement park engineering....

item.title: White House Memo Reportedly Warned Against Proposal to Suspend Habeas Corpus During Deportation Efforts
item.description: A report discussed by former federal prosecutor Joyce Vance highlights internal disagreements within the Trump administration over a proposal to suspend habeas corpus as part of efforts to accelerate ...

item.title: Analyst says Trump’s decision-making on Iran war influenced by diplomatic flattery and ego framing
item.description: The article reports on analysis suggesting that President Donald Trump’s approach to ending the conflict with Iran was significantly shaped by flattery from Middle Eastern leaders and diplomatic frami...

item.title: Federal government reviews and suspends some citizenship certificates granted under expanded citizenship-by-descent rules
item.description: The federal government has suspended an unspecified number of Canadian citizenship certificates that were issued under recent changes to Canada's citizenship-by-descent legislation. Individuals affect...

item.title: Dispute Emerges Over Reported Economic Incentives in U.S.-Iran Memorandum of Understanding
item.description: A political controversy arose after President Donald Trump rejected media reports claiming that the United States would provide Iran with hundreds of billions of dollars as part of a recently announce...
